options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <uncertainty_value> # Uncertainty value to be applied (float, optional) <pin_or_clock_list> # List of clocks or pins for target uncertainty

options.name: -fall
options.description: Falling edge at the capture clock pin on which the uncertainty is applied

options.name: -fall_from
options.description: Applies the uncertainty value only to the falling edge of the launching clocks

options.name: -fall_to
options.description: Applies the uncertainty value only to the falling edge of the capture clocks

options.name: -from
options.description: Applies the uncertainty value to both the rising and falling edges of the launching clocks

options.name: -hold
options.description: Clock uncertainty applies to hold checks

options.name: -rise
options.description: Rising edge at the capture clock pin on which the uncertainty is applied

options.name: -rise_from
options.description: Applies the uncertainty value only to the rising edge of the launching clocks

options.name: -rise_to
options.description: Applies the uncertainty value only to the rising edge of the capture clocks

options.name: -setup
options.description: Clock uncertainty applies to setup checks

options.name: -to
options.description: Applies the uncertainty value to both the rising and falling edges of the capture clocks
